notes: Misclassified as TEST — no assertions or test loop present. Playwright used instrumentally for scraping and live web automation (sola.day calendar app). Primary output is a new skill file (Claude Lab Events / 4Cs trigger). Pattern: skill authored immediately after Claude demonstrates workflow in live browser session. Notable: human-in-the-loop auth handoff (David completed MFA step while Claude waited). Two new tool_pattern subtypes proposed: playwright_as_scraper and playwright_live_automation.
